headline: Gaming ETF Becomes Growth Fund; Trailing Dividend Payout No Longer Reflects New Holdings
summary: The VanEck Digital Native Economy ETF (NASDAQ:GENZ) is the same fund that traded for years as the VanEck Gaming ETF, VanEck Vectors Gaming ETF (NASDAQ:BJK), until VanEck flipped its mandate on April 9, 2026. The reshuffled basket still carries a trailing 3.77% distribution yield on the VanEck site, but that figure was earned by a ... Gaming ETF Becomes Growth Fund; Trailing Dividend Payout No Longer Reflects New Holdings
